generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we relied on foreign tech for our defense systems? That's a risk we can't afford. Local production means jobs for our kids and grandkids, and it keeps our military safe from supply chain disruptions. The neighbors down the street in Ohio just opened a new factory making critical components - they're hiring veterans and paying fair wages. Why would we gamble with our security by going back to foreign dependencies? #StrongerTogether #MadeInAmerica
